source_excerpt: In 2025, worldwide sales increased 6.0% to $94.2 billion as compared to an increase of 4.3% in 2024.
notes: The source attributes the 6.0% increase to $94.2 billion in worldwide sales to fiscal year 2025, not fiscal 2023 as the claim states. This is a clear attribution mismatch — the figures themselves match the source but are assigned to the wrong fiscal year.
